summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TLS Advocate Management System. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with one critical admin login redirect issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login succeeds but does not redirect to admin dashboard - stays on login page
ui_bugs.details: Admin authentication works (shows 'Welcome back!' toast), but routing fails to redirect to /admin or /dashboard for admin users

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access admin dashboard after successful login
integration_issues.details: Admin login API works, but frontend routing does not properly handle admin role redirection

passed_tests: Landing page loads with TLS branding
Digital stamp creation with QR codes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login redirect issue in frontend routing. Admin authentication works but users are not redirected to admin dashboard after successful login. Check AuthContext and routing logic for admin role handling.
